description_long: This sculpture depicts a standing human figure, likely inspired by classical or religious iconography, with a serene facial expression and detailed hair. The figure is dressed in a draped garment that falls to mid-calf, with one arm bent at the elbow and the other extended slightly forward, both hands open. The sculpture stands on a small, polygonal pedestal that is integral to the piece. The surface appears to be made of a light-colored stone or plaster, with subtle textural variations and some visible wear. The back of the figure is less detailed, with the garment and body form smoothly rendered. The overall form is upright and slender, with a calm and dignified presence.
description: A light-colored stone or plaster sculpture of a standing human figure in draped clothing, with open hands and a serene expression, mounted on a small pedestal.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed face, open hands, and draped garment of the standing figure.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the bent arm, and the depth of the draped garment.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, less detailed back of the figure and the pedestal base.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the other profile, the extended arm, and the overall slenderness of the sculpture.
attribute_location_context: No specific setting or environment is visible; the background is plain and isolated.
